reason: Acceptance criteria + Definition of Done to verify against
Completeness check — verify every listed punch-list item is addressed (no orphan WSL strings remain post-PR2/PR3)
Code quality bar (lint, typecheck, forbidden patterns) for review of launcher PowerShell + any Python touched
Verify new launchers conform to install-mode bootstrap parity table, sentinel lifecycle, and PowerShell native-exe gotchas (both directions)
Verify launcher log lines follow [ARL] one-line key:value format, no multi-line dumps, no secret URLs
